text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen is on the horizon and
Manhattan Cafe is trying to turn over a new leaf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain her efforts to recover are thanks to our
bond—a bond that has only deepened since the
incident at the airport.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Manhattan Cafe's growth, Agnes Tachyon
is just as eager for her to transcend her limits and
cross over into unknown frontiers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our rival today is Silence Suzuka. Can Manhattan
Cafe overcome both her and her friend?
